titles.title: Kept by The Power of God

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We are kept by the power and favor of God From all the dominion of sin; He cleanseth by faith in His own precious blood, His spirit is reigning within.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: We are kept by the power of God, We are kept by the power of God; By trusting, obeying, By watching and praying, We are kept by the power of God.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We are kept by the power of God through faith So long as we walk in the light; Our helper is Jesus who faithfully saith, “I’m with you by day and by night. ”

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: We are kept by the power of God if we trust, We never need faint by the way; Then do as He bids you, His counsel is just, Be humble, be watchful, and pray.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: We are kept by the power of God each day, The story of grace we’ll repeat; Through Him we are conquerors if we obey, The foe we will ever defeat.
